entities.description: proceedings of the vldb endowment is the name of the publication venue mentioned in the text
vol  19 refers to the volume number of the publication
no  1 refers to the issue number of the publication
issn 2150 8097 is the international standard serial number assigned to the publication
doi xx xx xxx xx is the digital object identifier assigned to the document

relations.description: vol  19 is the volume associated with the proceedings of the vldb endowment
no  1 is the issue number associated with the proceedings of the vldb endowment
issn 2150 8097 is the identifier for the proceedings of the vldb endowment
doi xx xx xxx xx is the identifier for the specific article within the proceedings of the vldb endowment
